title: Trump Promises UFO File Releases 'Very, Very Soon' at Phoenix Rally
detail: At a Turning Point USA event at Dream City Church in Phoenix, Arizona, President Trump told the crowd that a Pentagon review of UAP files has uncovered 'many very interesting documents' and that 'the first releases will begin very, very soon.' Trump confirmed he recently spoke directly with Secretary of War Pete Hegseth about releasing the findings, stating the process is 'well underway.' The public announcement — made to an enthusiastic live audience four days after the Pentagon missed Rep. Luna's April 14 deadline for 46 classified UAP videos — marks the first time Trump specifically described the content of the classified review as 'interesting' before a public audience, escalating expectations ahead of the May 20, 2026 executive order 90-day milestone. The declaration also implicitly puts additional political pressure on the Pentagon to deliver materials before the deadline.
confidenceReason: Trump's public statements at a live rally confirmed by multiple major national outlets including Fox News and NBC News. Quotes directly from the speech.

media.caption: President Trump tells Phoenix crowd UFO file releases are coming 'very, very soon'
